summary: Comprehensive testing of ANAN (Autonomous Notary Agent Network) feature. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93%), 1 timeout on execute endpoint (GPT-5.2 calls took >60s). Frontend: All UI elements verified including stats, bond status, create form, agent cards with score rings, GPT-5.2 badges, consensus oracle, escalation queue, and blockchain seal.

minor.issue: Timeout in pytest (60s) - endpoint works but GPT-5.2 calls can take 30-60s. Verified working via curl with 120s timeout.

seed_data_creation: Created test ceremonies: TEST_ANAN_POA_*, TEST_ANAN_Execute_*, TEST_ANAN_Escalation_*, TEST_Execute_Verify
context_for_next_testing_agent: ANAN feature fully tested and working. GPT-5.2 agent scoring is REAL (not mocked). Execute endpoint takes 30-60 seconds due to 3 concurrent GPT-5.2 calls. SSE streaming endpoint accepts ?token= query param for auth. Bond management is virtual (not on-chain). Hedera sealing uses existing hedera_service which is REAL.

key_findings.anan_working: ANAN blind 2-of-3 consensus with GPT-5.2 is fully functional
key_findings.real_ai: All 3 agents (Verifier, Witness, Sealer) use REAL GPT-5.2 calls
key_findings.consensus_logic: Weighted average with thresholds: APPROVE (≥70, min≥40, 2+ pass), REJECT (<40 or min<15), ESCALATE (otherwise)
key_findings.bond_tracking: SAN bond tracks slashes and restocks (virtual, not on-chain)
key_findings.hedera_sealing: Approved ceremonies are sealed on Hedera mainnet with real HCS submission
